email_opening: I have followed your work at Career Path and your focus on senior operators stepping from VP scope into C-suite mandates.
email_body_core: Starting Monday adds a coach-first execution layer: target-list discipline, market-signal tracking, outreach drafts, and prep briefs, while protecting your client relationship.
default_subject: For your VP-to-CXO clients: confidential execution support
default_body:
Hi Michael,

You coach senior operators stepping from VP scope into C-suite mandates. I run Starting Monday, a private search-operations platform for senior operators in transition.

Coaches I speak with consistently want three things:
- a coach-first model that protects the trust you already own with the client
- practical weekly execution: targets, signals, outreach drafts, and prep briefs
- strict confidentiality: no poaching, no noise, no heavy program overhead

Given your work at Career Path, this may be useful for select clients who need disciplined execution between coaching sessions.

Would it be a bad idea to do a 15-minute fit check next week?

Best,
Richard Rothschild

default_subject: For your CFO clients: confidential execution support
default_body:
Hi Elizabeth,

You coach finance leaders navigating CFO-level transitions. I run Starting Monday, a private search-operations platform for senior operators in transition.

Coaches I speak with consistently want three things:
- a coach-first model that protects the trust you already own with the client
- practical weekly execution: targets, signals, outreach drafts, and prep briefs
- strict confidentiality: no poaching, no noise, no heavy program overhead

Given your work at Strategic Hires, this may be useful for select clients who need disciplined execution between coaching sessions.

Would it be a bad idea to do a 15-minute fit check next week?

Best,
Richard Rothschild
